name: GORMAN RUPP CO
summary: The Gorman-Rupp Company, incorporated in Ohio in 1934, designs, manufactures, and globally sells pumps and pump systems. Products range from fractional horsepower units to multi-thousand horsepower systems serving water, wastewater, construction, dewatering, industrial, petroleum, fire suppression, HVAC, agriculture, and military applications. Pumps are sold through distributors, manufacturers representatives, retailers, and e-commerce in approximately 140 countries. The company operates in one business segment and reported net sales of $682.4 million in 2025.

products.name: Self-priming centrifugal pumps
products.description: Pumps for water, wastewater, construction, and industrial liquid-handling applications.

products.name: Submersible pumps
products.description: Large submersible pumps with motor components for various liquid-handling applications.

products.name: Vertical turbine line shaft pumps
products.description: Pumps used in water and wastewater handling and flood control.

products.name: High-pressure booster pumps
products.description: Used to boost low residential water pressure and for industrial applications.

products.name: Fire suppression pumps
products.description: Pumps for sprinkler back-up, stand pipes, fog, and deluge systems at various facilities.

products.name: Rotary gear pumps
products.description: Used for pumping refined petroleum products including aircraft ground refueling.

products.name: Diaphragm pumps
products.description: Small pumps for food processing, chemical processing, medical, and HVAC applications.

products.name: Integrated water and wastewater pumping stations
products.description: Fully-integrated encased pump stations for large-scale water and wastewater handling.

products.name: Magnetic drive centrifugal pumps
products.description: Centrifugal pumps with magnetic drive for various liquid-handling applications.

products.name: Axial and mixed-flow pumps
products.description: Pumps for high-capacity liquid-handling including flood control and agricultural use.

partnerships.description: Long-standing relationships with leading independent distributors; company provides specialized training programs.
Export sales made primarily through foreign distributors and representatives across approximately 140 countries.
Used for sales to certain original equipment manufacturers in the U.S. and internationally.
